episodes.title: Religious Rebrand Today Tonight -  Ex Exclusive Brethren member, Marion Evans' Story
episodes.description: A "scratch the surface" look at how the Exclusive Brethren (EB) who have now rebranded themselves as The Plymouth Brethren Christian Church (PBCC) treated a former member.  Marion Evans left the cult she was born into as a young adult in 1986.    Due to their unChristian doctrine of separation she was completely cut off from all her family and friends.  Marion developed a secret relationship with her parents (but not her brother) for over twenty years.  After her father died in 2008, her mother, suffering from Dementia, was kidnapped, taken to Australia and held their despite her plea to return to her UK home. Marion has spoken out against the EB/PBCC and the cruelty with which they treat those who choose a different way of life.
